text.title: Video Gen Tools — Provider + Fallback Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: What is the style_tag in the brief?

branch.question: Is Runway in cooldown (last 3 calls returned FAILED)?

branch.conclusion: Primary: Runway Gen-3. Fallback: Luma → Replicate. On SUCCEEDED, stream-download immediately and archive to S3 within the same call.
Skip Runway. Primary: Luma. Fallback: Replicate AnimateDiff. Keep provider:task_id pairing in providers_tried.
Primary: Luma. Fallback: Runway → Replicate SVD. Stream-download on SUCCEEDED.
Primary: Replicate AnimateDiff with pinned sha. Fallback: Luma. Replicate latest-resolution is forbidden.
Primary: Replicate SVD with pinned sha (cheapest). Fallback: Replicate AnimateDiff. Iterate cheap; promote to Runway/Luma only on final pass.

example.p: Input: style_tag=cinematic, runway_cooldown=false → primary Runway. Runway returns FAILED policy → fallback Luma. Luma returns SUCCEEDED → stream-download → ffprobe ok → S3 archive → status=ok, providers_tried=[runway:failed, luma:ok].
